scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=2048 slidev build slides/index.md --out dist --base ./ && echo 'Build completed. Checking dist directory:' && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = './dist'; if (fs.existsSync(path)) { console.log('dist directory exists'); const files = fs.readdirSync(path); console.log('Contents:', files.slice(0, 10).join(', ') + (files.length > 10 ? '...' : '')); } else { console.log('dist directory does not exist'); }"
